title: RTE Karnataka Lottery Result 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: RTE Karnataka Lottery Result 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: RTE Karnataka Lottery Result 2026 OUT for 1st Round Seat Allotment on the official website - schooleducation.karnataka.gov.in on 25 May 2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the RTE Karnataka Lottery Result 2026 seat allotment list online.

content.text: The Department of School Education, Government of Karnataka, has officially released the RTE Karnataka Lottery Result 2026 for the first round of seat allotment for the 2026-27 academic session. The lottery result has been prepared based on online applications submitted for admission to entry-level classes such as pre-primary or LKG and Class 1 under the Right to Education quota across government-notified private schools in the state.

RTE Karnataka Lottery Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - schooleducation.karnataka.gov.in. Parents and guardians can check the RTE lottery seat allotment result by visiting the RTE admission portal and accessing the application status page using their registered details. After logging in with the required credentials, they can download and print the provisional allotment details for use during the enrollment window as per the official schedule. Students and parents are advised to carefully verify child details, school allotment, and category information, and contact the concerned authorities or helpline immediately in case of any discrepancy.

sections.heading: RTE Karnataka Lottery Result 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: The Department of School Education has activated the RTE Karnataka Lottery Result 2026 link for the first round of online seat allotment for the 2026-27 academic session. The result covers eligible applicants for RTE admissions in pre-primary/LKG and Class 1, and can be accessed through the official schooleducation.karnataka.gov.in portal and the dedicated application status link. Parents can log in using their application details to check the allotted school, download the result, and complete enrollment within the notified dates.

rows: RTE Karnataka Lottery Result 2026 for Admissions 2026-27
Department of School Education, Government of Karnataka
Pre-primary/LKG and Class 1 under RTE quota

sections.heading: RTE Karnataka Lottery Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: The Department of School Education has enabled direct links for parents to check the RTE Karnataka Lottery Result 2026 and application status online. Using these links, applicants can quickly view their child's seat allotment details, download the provisional result, and then proceed for admission at the allotted school within the prescribed dates. All links provided below are official and should be accessed only through the authorized government portals to avoid misinformation.

links.label: RTE Karnataka Lottery Result 2026 - Application Status
RTE Karnataka Lottery Result 2026 - Official Website

sections.heading: How to Check RTE Karnataka Lottery Result 2026

content.text: Follow the steps given below to check and download the RTE Karnataka Lottery Result 2026 online in a simple and user-friendly manner.

items: Visit the official RTE Karnataka admission portal at the Department of School Education website schooleducation.karnataka.gov.in.
On the homepage, go to the RTE admissions section and look for the RTE Karnataka Lottery Result or Application Status link.
Click on the Application Status or Lottery Result link, which redirects to the RTE application status page at sdcedn.karnataka.gov.in.
Enter the required details such as Application Number and registered Mobile Number in the given fields.
Submit the details to view the RTE Karnataka Lottery Result 2026 seat allotment status on the screen.
Check the allotted school, category, and other details carefully and download or print the result for future reference.
